source_pr.title: executor: fix data race in TestStatementContext
source_pr.body:

Fix #13173

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: executor: fix data race in TestStatementContext.
